items.name_cn:
💰
Monogram college
The classic messenger bag!!!
A messenger bag, as the name implies, is the bag carried by mail carriers when delivering newspapers and letters. Bags similar to those carried by mail carriers are collectively referred to as messenger bags. When mentioning messenger bags, this one from Y must be on the list!
Size: 24x17x6.5cm
Model: 392737

items.name_en: [Genuine Leather] #LouLou puffer# LOULOU PUFFER Mini Quilted Lambskin Bag, a super hot style with the latest mini size from the counter! Made with genuine ZP leather, soft and delicate to the touch, small and cute like a marshmallow when carried! Features a zippered interior pocket for phone and valuables, and a card slot; otherwise, no extra pockets, small but fully functional! Size: 23x15.5x5.8cm Model: 620333 168520

items.name_en: [Genuine Leather] LOULOU PUFFER_ Large 35cm. Quilted Lambskin Bag, made with genuine authentic leather, soft and delicate to the touch, like holding a cloud ☁️; classic Y-logo, chain, and buckle hardware are all in Brushed Gold hardware; the bag uses a magnetic snap closure at the opening, offering excellent sealing and security! Features a zippered interior pocket for phone and valuables, otherwise no extra pockets, easy to use! Genuine leather! Genuine leather! Genuine leather! Size: 23x15.5x5.8cm Style No: 620333 Denim 168450

items.name_en: Black Gold Buckle Wax Leather·Double Chain
items.name_cn:
Black Gold Buckle Wax Leather·Double Chain
Loulou Puffer mini_ Mini Double Chain Bag is here! The whole bag is made of imported wax leather, paired with Y's diagonal quilted craftsmanship, featuring a soft front flap bag, with a detachable shoulder strap, can be used as a storage bag, or use the adjustable buckle as a crossbody bag, easily achieving multi-use!
Model: 759337~168520
Size: 23×15.5×8.5cm

items.name_en: 【Genuine Leather】#Envelope# Small 21CM
items.name_cn:
【Genuine Leather】#Envelope# Small 21CM
Genuine leather embossed quilted envelope bag, classic is eternal. Stunning V-pattern combined with a diamond-quilted caviar texture. Italian ZP genuine cowhide paired with a bold Y-logo, combining elegance and fashion. It feels like ZP when held! Definitely take it to the counter for comparison! Counter price 14600.... Don't waste money! Buying from us is enough!
Model: 526286~600915 Genuine Leather
Size: 21x13x6cm 168500

items.name_en: 【Genuine Leather】LE 37 Small Glossy Leather Bag New Arrival, Super Cute Bucket Bag with Handle_New Shape, made of Italian calfskin. The bag features a simple, structured silhouette that looks structured yet not too sharp. It has metal studs at the bottom and a classic iconic metal logo insert clasp. The overall look gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish!

items.name_en: 【Saint Laurent】🌈Premium Exclusive🔥Black/Gold
items.name_cn:
【Saint Laurent】🌈Premium Exclusive🔥Black/Gold
New BEA Tote Bag, leather buckle closure, decorated with LE CASSANDRE. Spacious interior with matching suede lining, featuring one main compartment and an internal zip pocket. Adjustable internal strap, sides can be folded or expanded as needed. Soft deer leather BEA exclusive rare luxury texture, simple appearance paired with this softness creates a lazy look. Sides can also be contracted, offering two forms 👑
Model: 763435
Size: 50x28x18cm

specs.rawTitle:
